Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Yerin's Goldsign]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 13''' — Yerin's Goldsign is a flashing arm of steel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 16''' — Yerin is getting better with her Goldsign.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 18''' — Yerin possesses a Goldsign that draws back like a snake.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 3''' — Yerin's Goldsign is a silver arm ending in a blade like a scorpion’s stinger.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 5''' — Yerin possesses a Goldsign that can arch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 14''' — Yerin has a Goldsign that sometimes slips from her control.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 15''' — Yerin possesses a Goldsign.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 22''' — Yerin has a Goldsign.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
